notes: Slot values correspond to GearSlot enum in engine.py (Head, Shoulders, Chest, Arms, Legs, R.Hand, L.Hand, R.Ring, L.Ring, Neck). Traits match engine special_traits. Value is in Amber Shards (standard currency). Consumables and utilities have slot 'none'. Tier maps to GearTier: I=Scrap/Wood, II=Iron/Leather, III=Steel/Silver, IV=Mithral/Gold.

1.name: Rusted Shortsword
1.description: Pitted blade with a leather-wrapped grip worn smooth by a dead man's palm. Still sharp enough to matter.

1.name: Padded Jerkin
1.description: Layers of quilted bark-cloth stitched with sinew. Stops a glancing blow but not much else.

1.name: Burglar's Gloves
1.description: Thin leather gloves with wire-stiffened fingertips. The previous owner's luck ran out, but the gloves didn't.

1.name: Wooden Buckler
1.description: A round of layered bark bound with copper wire. Splinters on heavy impacts but holds for the hits that count.

1.name: Tattered Hood
1.description: Ash-stained cloth that keeps the worst of the spore-fall out of your eyes. Fashion is not the point.

1.name: Worn Boots
1.description: Cracked leather soles patched with bark strips. They've walked further than you have.

1.name: Rot-Salve Pouch
1.description: A leather pouch of grey-green paste that smells of pine resin and something bitter. Burns going on, but the bleeding stops.

1.name: Torch Bundle
1.description: Three sticks of dried heartwood wrapped in oil-soaked cloth. They burn with a warm amber glow that keeps the dark at arm's length.

1.name: Scrap Iron
1.description: Bent nails, broken hinges, a length of chain. Worthless alone, but Weld can make something of it.

1.name: Hunter's Shortbow
1.description: A short recurve bow carved from fire-hardened branch wood. The string hums faintly in the presence of Aether veins.

1.name: Leather Bracers
1.description: Stiff hide strapped to the forearms with copper buckles. The leather is cracked but the buckles hold.

1.name: Crude Hatchet
1.description: A wedge of iron lashed to a branch handle. Meant for splitting kindling, but splits other things just as well.

1.name: Bandages
1.description: Strips of boiled cloth rolled tight. Sister Tallow makes them by the dozen, and they're never enough.

1.name: Ember Shard
1.effect: Lights area for 5 rooms. Repels Tier I beasts
1.description: A sliver of crystallized Aether that glows with a steady amber warmth. Creatures of the shallow dark flinch from its light.

1.name: Rope Coil
1.description: Thirty feet of braided bark-fiber rope. Strong enough for one person's weight. Probably.

2.name: Forged Longsword
2.description: Proper ironwork from the Ember-Forge, the blade marked with Weld's anvil stamp. It holds an edge through bone and bark alike.

2.name: Chain Shirt
2.description: Interlocking iron rings over a leather backing. Heavy, hot, and the reason you're still breathing.

2.name: Steel Shield
2.description: A kite shield with a petrified bark face and iron rim. The Intercept strap lets you throw it between an ally and harm.

2.name: Iron Helm
2.description: An open-faced helm with a nasal guard. The padding inside still smells of the last wearer's sweat.

2.name: Reinforced Boots
2.description: Leather boots with iron-plate shinguards riveted to the uppers. Your footfalls ring on stone but nothing bites through.

2.name: Compound Bow
2.description: A recurve bow with iron-reinforced limbs and a silk string. Twice the draw weight of a hunter's bow, twice the killing range.

2.name: War Hammer
2.description: An iron head on an ironbark haft, weighted for overhead swings that crack chitin and stone alike.

2.name: Alchemist's Kit
2.description: A roll of treated leather containing glass vials, a mortar, copper tongs, and a thumb-sized Aether burner. Elder Maven would trade a great deal for one of these.

2.name: Greater Rot-Salve
2.effect: Heals 2d4+2 HP. Cures early-stage Blight infection
2.description: A sealed clay jar of concentrated herbal paste, the recipe known only to Sister Tallow and one other she won't name.

2.name: Ironvein Gauntlets
2.description: Articulated iron gloves with spring-loaded fingertips. The lockpick mechanisms are built into the index fingers -- a Patchwork Pete original.

2.name: Scout's Cloak
2.description: A hooded cloak dyed with ash and bark extract, its pattern breaking the wearer's silhouette against stone corridors. Scout Lira swears by them.

2.name: Firebrand Torch
2.effect: Reduces DoomClock by 1. Burns for 5 rooms. Deals 1d6 fire to rot creatures on contact
2.description: An iron-cased torch soaked in concentrated Aether oil. Burns hotter and brighter than common torches, and the Rot recoils from its flame.

3.name: Embersteel Blade
3.description: A longsword forged with Aether-tempered steel, its edge glowing faintly amber in darkness. The blade hums when swung -- not a song, but close.

3.name: Warden's Plate
3.description: Full plate armor bearing the Emberhome Warden's sigil -- a burning tree. Captain Ashara has authorized exactly three sets for field deployment.

3.name: Ashward Shield
3.description: A tower shield faced with petrified Burnwillow bark. Absorbs rot-energy on impact -- the surface darkens with each blow absorbed, then slowly clears.

3.name: Crown of Vigilance
3.description: A circlet of twisted silver wire set with a single amber bead. The wearer cannot be surprised and gains +1 to Wits checks in the dark.

3.name: Strider's Greaves
3.description: Steel-and-leather leg armor with spring-loaded ankle joints. Movement is silent on stone, and the wearer can cross difficult terrain without penalty.

3.name: Rotbane Longbow
3.description: A longbow with Aether-infused limbs and amber-tipped arrows that burn on impact. Deals bonus 1d4 fire damage to rot-touched creatures.

3.name: Doom-Warded Gauntlets
3.description: Silver-plated gauntlets inscribed with Elder Kaelen's own warding prayers. DoomClock advances 1 less per room while worn.

3.name: Phoenix Salve
3.effect: Heals 3d6 HP. Revives a downed character to 1 HP if applied within 1 round of falling
3.description: A glass vial of liquid amber that radiates warmth through the container. Father Oaken blesses each one individually, and each blessing is different.

3.name: Emberheart Lantern
3.effect: Permanent light source. Reduces DoomClock by 2 when first lit each run. Reveals hidden Amber Vaults within 2 rooms
3.description: An ironwork lantern housing a shard of the original Sun-Shard that lights the Hearth. Its flame has never gone out.

3.name: Forgemaster's Tools
3.effect: Allows field repairs: restore 1 tier to a damaged item. 3 uses per run
3.description: A leather roll of specialized implements -- amber-tipped chisels, Aether-threaded needles, a miniature singing fork. Weld made them for himself and refuses to explain how he parted with this set.

4.name: Sunfire Greatsword
4.description: A two-handed blade of Arborist mithral that burns with captured sunlight. The [Ritual] trait allows the wielder to channel the Root-Song through the blade, dealing 2d6 bonus fire damage to Hollows.

4.name: Aegis of the Last Flame
4.description: Plate armor grown from living ironbark and infused with a Sun-Shard core. It mends itself between combats and casts a circle of warmth that shelters the entire party. The last Arborist Warden wore its twin.

4.name: Crown of the Unbroken
4.description: A circlet of living amber that pulses with the Root-Song. The wearer gains Aether 18 (if lower) and can read Memory Seeds without returning to Emberhome.

4.name: Boots of the Ember Walker
4.description: Boots that leave faintly glowing footprints. The wearer is immune to fire hazards and can walk across lava, magma vents, and Crown-fire zones without harm.

4.name: Rot Hunter's Bane
4.description: A composite longbow with mithral limbs and a string of braided Root-Song crystal. Its arrows track Hollows unerringly -- +3 to attack rolls against rot-touched creatures. The only ranged weapon capable of piercing the Rot Hunter's DR.

4.name: The Hollow King's Gauntlets
4.description: Gauntlets of dead amber and blackened mithral, taken from the Hollow King himself. They remember every lock and every throat they ever held. The [Lockpick] trait opens any lock, including Amber Vaults.

4.name: Elixir of Renewal
4.effect: Full HP restoration. Cures all Blight infection. Reduces DoomClock by 5
4.description: A vial of pure liquid Sun-Shard, warm as a held hand. Drinking it feels like the first morning after a long winter. The tree gave this willingly.

4.name: Beacon of Dawn
4.effect: Reduces DoomClock by 10. One use per campaign. Permanently purifies one room of all Rot
4.description: A fist-sized sphere of concentrated Sun-Shard amber, older than Emberhome itself. When shattered, it releases a burst of the tree's original fire -- enough to burn the Rot out of a room forever. The Arborists made twelve. Eleven have been used.
